title: Booking (SvelteKit) — public home content
description: The contract for the customer-facing home page (src/routes/+page.svelte). An agent fills src/content.json to match this schema, validates, then runs the verify command. This phase covers the home page only — see CLAUDE.md for where brand name, services, and theme live.

x-microservices.verify: npm run validate && npm run build
x-microservices.notes: Only the public home page is content-driven here. Business name, currency, timezone, and booking policy live in microservices.config.json. Brand colors/fonts live in src/app.css (see THEMING.md). Booking flow, admin, and email copy are not yet externalized.

features.x-hint: Exactly 3 short benefit bullets — the panel renders a fixed list.

cta.description: A call-to-action button. By convention hero.primaryCta links to /book and hero.secondaryCta to /admin.
